Interface IReplacePathsParameters

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control parameters to replace paths.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("D9179EDC-C88A-4B6F-818F-F53D83A05519")]
public interface IReplacePathsParameters

Properties

NewPaths

The array of possible target paths that each item is replaced with.

IStringArray NewPaths { get; set; }

Property Value

IStringArray

Examples

Sample Snippet

OldPaths

The array of source paths to be replaced.

IStringArray OldPaths { get; set; }

Property Value

IStringArray

Examples

Sample Snippet

ReplaceCatalogItemPaths

Indicates whether paths in selected mosaic catalog items are replaced.

bool ReplaceCatalogItemPaths { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

ReplaceItemURIPaths

Indicates whether paths in item URIs are replaced.

bool ReplaceItemURIPaths { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

ReplaceMosaicDatasetPaths

Indicates whether paths in mosaic dataset level objects are replaced.

bool ReplaceMosaicDatasetPaths { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet
